title: Randy Young
compiled_truth: Randy Young is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-07-15 to 2001-07-02), Randy Young sent 14 and received 156 emails, totalling 170 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark Haedicke](people/mark-haedicke) (8), [Frank Stabler](people/frank-stabler) (5), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (4), [David Gorte](people/david-gorte) (2), [Andre Cangucu](people/andre-cangucu) (2).
